title: Integrations
hubspot.name: HubSpot
hubspot.subtitle: CRM & Lead Management
hubspot.description: Automatically push new leads and call data into HubSpot CRM.
hubspot.step1: Go to HubSpot → Settings → Integrations → Private Apps
hubspot.step2: Create a new private app with "contacts" scope
hubspot.step3: Copy the access token and paste it below
zapier.name: Zapier
zapier.subtitle: Connect 6,000+ Apps
zapier.description: Send lead data to any app via Zapier webhooks — Slack, Mailchimp, Airtable, and more.
zapier.step1: Create a new Zap in Zapier
zapier.step2: Choose "Webhooks by Zapier" as the trigger
zapier.step3: Select "Catch Hook" and copy the webhook URL
zapier.step4: Paste it below — we'll send lead data to this URL
googleSheets.name: Google Sheets
googleSheets.subtitle: Spreadsheet Sync
googleSheets.description: Automatically add new leads as rows in your Google Sheets spreadsheet.
slack.name: Slack
slack.subtitle: Team Notifications
slack.description: Get real-time lead and call notifications in your Slack channels.
calcom.name: Cal.com
calcom.subtitle: Calendar & Scheduling
calcom.description: Connect your Cal.com calendar to enable appointment booking.
whatsapp.name: WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Business Messaging
whatsapp.description: Send automated WhatsApp messages to leads and clients.
setup.title: Setup Instructions
setup.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Please check your credentials.
